reviews.comment:
Bien atendida como todas las estaciones de servicios del ACA, pero las instalaciones,  especialmente los baños no condicen con el servicio que normalmente brinda el Club. Lo mismo sucede con el drugstore, con escasa y poco variada oferta de  mercaderias.

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, like all ACA service stations, but the facilities, especially the restrooms, don't match the standard the Club usually provides. The same goes for the convenience store, which has a limited and unvaried selection of goods.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBNU5mcnp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Ideal para quien está de paso y no quiere entrar a Bahía blanca Habitaciones cómodas limpias muy buen restaurante en el lugar Muy recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for those passing through who don't want to go into Bahía Blanca. Comfortable, clean rooms, very good restaurant on site. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURndjktLXdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lindas habitaciones, cómodas con aire, baño con bañera, WiFi, cable. Muy bueno el comedor. Comida casera y muy rica. Al pagar con tarjeta de crédito o débito no andaba el sistema.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice, comfortable rooms with air conditioning, bathroom with bathtub, Wi-Fi, and cable TV. The dining room is very good. Homemade food and delicious. The credit/debit card payment system wasn't working.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRLTl5NEVREAE
